metadata.synopsis: When a gang of alien-clowns land in a nearby area (in a ship shaped like a circus big-top), the cops are skeptical. But before long, there can be no doubt: Killer Klowns from Outer Space are here to turn the Earth's population into candy floss!
metadata.title: Killer Klowns From Outer Space

metadata.synopsis: The less-than-appealing podiatrist, Dr. Heckyl, invents a potion that turns him into Mr. Hype, a handsome, charismatic lady killer - literally!
metadata.title: Dr. Heckyl & Mr. Hype

metadata.synopsis: It's the horrifying and hilarious ride into the darkest regions of hell that started it all! When Jonathan (Peter Liapis) inherits his late father's home and finds a book of spells, he unlocks unimaginable demonic horrors!
metadata.title: Ghoulies

metadata.synopsis: The Ghoulies are back and more devilish than ever as they turn an unsuspecting carnival into a house of pandemonium in this wildly outrageous sequel to the smash hit "Ghoulies!" Damon Martin and Royal Dano star in this cult-classic!
metadata.title: Ghoulies II

metadata.synopsis: The streets of London are transformed into a smorgasbord for an alien creature with a taste for human flesh. Don't just panic…run for your lives!
metadata.title: The Quatermass Xperiment

metadata.synopsis: When a rocket lands on Mars, the crew finds the planet not entirely dead. As the team begins to explore, they are attacked by horrific and demented creatures at every turn. Battling for their lives, can the survivors make it back to their ship?
metadata.title: The Angry Red Planet
